programme.desc: As the Class of '92 begin their seventh season as owners of Salford City, an early managerial change disrupts the team's start to the campaign.

programme.title: Chronicles of a Champion Golfer
programme.desc: A look at one of The Open's great champions. Here, the focus is on Irishman Padraig Harrington, a two-time Open winner, who took back-to-back titles in 2007 and 2008.

programme.title: The 8th Continent?
programme.desc: Fifty years ago for the first time astronauts in the shape of Neil Armstrong and Edwin "Buzz" Aldrin, put their feet on the lunar surface. But does the rendezvous in space remain the climax in the relationship between man and moon? Or could the moon become our second earth in the future, maybe even the eighth continent?

programme.title: The Silicon Valley Revolution
programme.sub-title: How a few nerds did change the world
programme.desc: The Silicon Valley Revolution - How a few nerds did change the world - From Hippies to the first PC: Todays' Silicon Valley is the home for multi-million dollar IT companies. In the beginning, however, it was unsophisticated, colourful, chaotic, and revolutionary. Hippies and amateur entrepreneurs initiated an unprecedented revolution: the pioneers of the PC wanted to change the world in an attempt to dethrone the “Big Brother”.

programme.title: The Human Limits
programme.desc: The Human Limits - Season 1 - Physical Masters: In this part, the focus is set on four individuals going beyond their physical boundaries. There's freediving world record holder Herbert Nitsch who can hold his breath for more than nine minutes, Wim Hof who likes going for a walk in the Arctic preferably without clothes, human echolocation expert Daniel Kish who can ride a bicycle despite his blindness and Bavarian ice climbing champion Ines Papers.

programme.title: The Story of Europe
programme.desc: The Story of Europe - Commonalities and Division: Europe has been a battle concept for centuries: it often takes foreign enemies to weld the Europeans together. But for centuries, they are primarily fighting against themselves. It was not until the Enlightenment and the French Revolution of 1789 that a new idea of Europe emerged based on common values: freedom, equality and fraternalism.

programme.title: The Story of Europe
programme.desc: The Story of Europe - State of Play: Europe has never experienced such a long period of peace and prosperity as after the Second World War. When the Iron Curtain falls in 1989, the dream of a Europe united in peace and freedom seems finally to become reality. But whether financial or refugee crisis - the European euphoria has disappeared, nationalists are on the rise again.

programme.title: Tales of the Cold War
programme.desc: Some just counted tanks, others stole blueprints for nuclear bombs. During the Cold War, Germany was the battleground for thousands of spies and spotters. The threat of nuclear overkill provoked a near insatiable hunger for intelligence on both sides of the Iron Curtain.

programme.title: The 8th Continent?
programme.desc: Fifty years ago for the first time astronauts in the shape of Neil Armstrong and Edwin "Buzz" Aldrin, put their feet on the lunar surface. But does the rendezvous in space remain the climax in the relationship between man and moon? Or could the moon become our second earth in the future, maybe even the eighth continent?

programme.title: Surviving Mars
programme.desc: Science may soon make the dream of traveling to Mars a reality, but how will we live once we get there?

programme.title: First Martians
programme.desc: Sometime in the future humans will leave Earth to colonize Mars, and in doing so will begin to adapt to life on another planet in surprising ways.

programme.title: The Planet Hunters
programme.desc: Since the discovery of the first so-called exoplanet in 1994, the Planet Hunters have transformed the way we see the universe.

programme.title: The Explorers
programme.desc: A look at the continuing evolution of the cosmos. What our existence tells us about the universe and how complicated it is. Why are things the way that they are?

programme.title: Second Genesis
programme.desc: Artemis arrives on the exoplanet Minerva B, but have they found evidence of life?

programme.title: Contact
programme.desc: Minerva B is a small rocky planet just like earth, where spacecraft Artemis has found water, organic molecules, and complex creatures. Finally, Artemis has found life.

programme.title: Hack the Moon: Unsung Heroes of Apollo
programme.desc: The remarkable story of the engineers behind the revolutionary technologies developed for the Apollo missions.

programme.title: The Elevator
programme.desc: They're the backbone of the modern city and they've shaped the world around us. But, have you ever thought about whether elevators are actually saving us time?

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Pregnant woolly monkey Piquita looks fit to burst, capuchin Sean, over from Chile, is keen to prove that nobody can groom quite like he can, and life hangs in the balance for Blue the ruffed lemur.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Baby woolly monkey Paulo is tempted outside by some delicious bugs, while onions are used to encourage natural behaviour amongst the capuchins. The team also has a radical plan for the third meeting between youngster Ben and alpha male Hananya.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: There is a scuffle between the female capuchins, Tia needs surgery, and orang-utan Amy is heavily pregnant - and very grumpy. Meanwhile, there is something new in the play area of the chimp nursery, and Alison has her last visit with Paulo.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Chimp Ben has a nasty infection and animal director Jeremy is worried it may lead to him losing his foot. Elsewhere, golden-cheeked gibbon Tien has undergone a transformation, and keeper Holly checks up on Xuzy.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Chimp Ben's mysterious infection has spread to some of the others in his group, and it's a race against time to diagnose and treat it effectively. Meanwhile, the orang-utans are watching their weight, but are not so keen to get onto the scales.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Chimp Ben's foot infection has led to the amputation of one of his toes. Just as he's improving, Honey, one of the chimps in Hananya's house, is struck down by the mysterious bacterial infection - and it is serious.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Mueller's gibbons Adidas and Dalumie head for the treetops for the first time, while Peanut, Pung-Yo and Tien move into the enclosure next door. Plus, a specialist doctor is called in when Freddy's bowel complaint fails to improve.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison Cronin travels to Monkey World's new endangered primate sanctuary in Vietnam, and meets the newest resident of the centre, Ellie the young golden-cheeked gibbon. Two rare monkeys are being kept in a theme park outside Ho Chi Minh City.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Jonathan is over groomed and has gone bald, while Tom, one of the alpha male capuchins, has died. Elsewhere, the chimps are given walnuts and Jestah gets more than his fair share.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Disturbing footage convinces Alison to rescue an adult female chimpanzee working in the tourist industry in Mexico, who urgently needs the team's help. The nursery chimps have a play session.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison and Jeremy are tasked with rescuing feisty capuchin monkeys from Spain at the sanctuary, keeper Mike watches over a baby woolly monkey, the newest arrival at the park.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison and Jeremy arrive home with two new capuchin monkeys from Spain, but one of them makes a bid for freedom. Something is wrong with one of Britain's best known chimps, Trudy. Debbie's capuchin group takes on a snack that bites back.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The chimps show off their football skills while the staff head to a neglected farm.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Nearly three hundred million people worldwide claim to have been abducted by aliens. Many report being subjected to torturous medical experiments. Others return with unwelcome reminders of their ordeal. Are aliens creating human hybrids?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: In the 1960s we too our first steps into a vast new realm-bound for the Moon. But NASA astronauts would soon find they weren't the only ones out there.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Some experts believe many atmospheric light shows are actually caused by extraterrestrials. Do they pose an imminent threat to humanity? Join us as the alien secrets behind atmospheric anomalies.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Millions of people believe extraterrestrial live on Earth. Are the aliens here to enlighten us or destroy us? What if the worst-case scenario happened? What would aliens do? And how would they do it?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: They're our first line of defense in the darkest of times. And they're often the first responders to threats from another world. Over the past 70 years the world's military forces have come face to face with thousands of UFOs.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Every day, millions take to the sky in commercial flights all over the world. But decades of evidence have revealed we may not be the world's only frequent flyers. Are we in danger of losing control of our skies to extraterrestrial beings?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: It's the stuff of nightmares. Emergency lines flooded with calls as UFOs appear in the sky. Mounting evidence has revealed that UFO waves are able to penetrate the world's most closely guarded airspace.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: In order to survive mankind must find a way to navigate the galaxy. Alien encounters have offered a possible glimpse into the secrets of interstellar flight, but how would extraterrestrials know how to navigate the vast regions of space?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Rapid advancements in science and technology have given mankind unprecedented access to distant galaxies that could harbor life. And some scientists believe that to find alien life we need look no further than our own backyard.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Photographic evidence of Unidentified Flying Objects helped usher in the modern UFO phenomenon.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Where do UFOs come from? Some people believe they're from distant galaxies, wormholes, or other planets within the Milky Way.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: In 1947, a series of UFO sightings triggers an unprecedented analysis that propels the UFO phenomenon on to the world stage.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: UFO sightings happen almost every day. But in the court of public opinion the most credible witnesses come from law enforcement.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Between 1981 and 2011, NASA's Space Shuttles flew 135 missions. The Space Shuttle cameras, manned and unmanned, have recorded astounding footage of UFOs that many experts find almost impossible to explain.

programme.title: Hidden Australia
programme.desc: Sometimes called the biggest island on Earth, Australia is a sub-continent of incredible diversity, beauty, danger and downright weirdness. The 4,000km between the coasts are made up of a patchwork of contrasting landscapes: tropical rainforests, snow-capped mountains, dry woodland, giant wetlands, tropical reefs and hostile desert. These vast tracts of wilderness boast the world's most unique and bizarre wildlife communities. In this ‘hidden' Australia, there is an astonishing surprise at every turn.

programme.desc: The group discovers Roxanne's childhood fear of lizards. Niven takes the opportunity to exploit it.

programme.desc: Agatha is feeling motivated again only to learn that she actually failed her exams and must leave the residency.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Drew and Agatha have to deal with a dog with a broken leg brought in by a group of youngsters with no money. Will Agatha stand up to Drew who has decided to send them away to find money, by insisting the dog stays at the clinic?

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Charlotte has growing cynicism towards the owner of the emaciated black dog, when he repeatedly dodges his responsibility. Charlotte and Roxy set out on a house call to investigate. What will they find at the owner's house? What condition are his other dogs in?

programme.title: Hannah Goes to Namibia
programme.desc: As soon as she arrives, conservationist Hannah Emde immerses herself in Namibia's wildlife. The first destination of her trip is the world-famous Naankuse Foundation near Windhoek

programme.title: Hannah Goes to Namibia

programme.title: Hannah Goes to Namibia

programme.title: Hannah Goes to Namibia

programme.title: Hidden Australia
programme.desc: Sometimes called the biggest island on Earth, Australia is a sub-continent of incredible diversity, beauty, danger and downright weirdness. programme.title: Frontier Vets

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Agatha is feeling motivated again only to learn that she actually failed her exams and must leave the residency.

programme.title: Wilderness in Europe: The Bohemian Forest
programme.desc: The Bohemian Forest is the source of the Vltava River, home to primeval forests, untouched high moors and bubbling torrents. This archaic stretch of land, which includes the Bavarian Forest, was long considered impenetrable and mysterious. Since the fall of the Iron Curtain, Bavarian border residents have rediscovered new references to this unusual forest landscape for themselves. This is also the case with photo artist Bastian Kalous, who has been documenting his homeland for years with nostalgic-looking Polaroid photographs and is dealing with its eventful history for an illustrated book. Or Elisa Belotti and Marco Heurich, who have dedicated their lives to the lynxes. In order for Europe's largest wild cat to survive in the Bohemian Forest, the lynx researchers fight for every single animal. Iryna Rudenko came to Zwiesel from Ukraine out of a passion for glass as a material to study at the glass school. After graduation, she would like to stay in Bavaria, Anna Hones grew up in Horská Kvilda, the smallest and highest village in the Czech Republic. The village lies just under 1100 meters above sea level, directly on the former border. The farmer, who experienced communism, the fall of the Iron Curtain and the subsequent changes, is now trying to find ways of surviving in this barren region with her children.

programme.title: Wilderness in Europe: The Bohemian Forest
programme.desc: Pavel Hubeny, whose life would be unthinkable without the forest, is the head of the Šumava National Park. He is committed to ensuring that a primeval forest can grow for future generations, in which man does not interfere. This vision of a primeval forest is also shared by the forester Claus Bässler, who wants to counteract the extinction of species by having trees felled to create artificial deadwood and thus a new habitat for rare beetles and fungi. On the Vltava River lies the small town of Krumlov, the "Pearl of the Bohemian Forest" with its Baroque theater and fully preserved stage technology from the 17th century. Here the director Zuzana Vrbová enchants people from all over the world with her productions. Apart from agriculture, it was mainly the abundance of forests that ensured the livelihood of the inhabitants of the Bohemian Forest - including that of the carpenter Philipp von Manz, who processed local wood for his customers all over Germany. Veterinarian Judith Gollner, who grew up in the Austrian part of the Bohemian Forest, lived in Vienna for a long time and made a conscious decision to return. She likes the people and is proud of "her farmers' wives" who share her love of the Bohemian Forest.

programme.title: Wild River Rhine
programme.desc: Alluvial forests, roaring waterfalls, steep canyons and sunny slopes flank the river Rhine. The variety of habitats is the reason for the large biodiversity along the stream.There is hardly any other river in Germany that is surrounded by as many myths and legends as the river Rhine. No other river has been the topic of songs, has been painted and travelled equally frequently. Despite this it still seems to be true today what the French poet Victor Hugo once said about this river – the Rhine is a river everybody talks about, nobody explores, everybody visits but no one really knows. The film follows the water against the stream. It starts at the river's delta in the Netherlands, flows through six countries and ends in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa
programme.desc: Photographer Matthias Ziegler is an Africa specialist. He has visited nearly every country on the continent on assignments for international agencies. Zanzibar, however, is new territory for him. He's come to the former slave island for a photo book – and this time he's not alone. To see the Tanzanian archipelago from the air, he has enlisted the services of ultralight pilot Richard Meredith-Hardy of England to fly him around in his FIB, or flying inflatable boat. Perfect conditions for an adventurous journey: as a world champion ultralight pilot, Richard and his FIB can take off and land practically anywhere – in theory.

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa
programme.desc: Renaud Van Der Meeren is a photographer and paramotor pilot. With his motorised parachute he goes on expeditions to the remotest corners on earth to photograph people and landscapes from the air. Renaud wanted to be a jet pilot, studied music at the Sorbonne, became a ski instructor, model and photographer's assistant before he found happiness in his current vocation. He especially likes to do his job in Mauritius – nowhere else does he find so many motifs as on the "sweetest pearl in the Indian Ocean". This time he's working on a photo book about Mauritius – by land, by water and in the air.

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa
programme.desc: Spirits, Kings, Lemurs – Madagascar treats Ami to a multitude of new impressions and spectacular pictures. Director Christian Schidlowski and his team accompanied her on her trip.

programme.title: Over the Islands of Africa
programme.desc: Along with photographer Rui Camilo, we travel to the West African island nation of Sao Tomé and Príncipe - in search of images that will capture the soul of this small and beautiful country.

programme.title: Black Mamba

programme.title: Earth Week

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats

programme.title: Animal Society
programme.desc: The great cats are a group of apex predators that rest firmly at the top of the food chain. Lions, leopards and tigers all live uniquely with particular hunting prowess, advantages and pack hierarchy or solitary territories.

programme.title: Super Senses 2: Special Forces

programme.title: Lions & Giants,
programme.desc: For decades the Savuti pride on the western boundary of the Chobe National Park in Botswana has ruled supreme. This pride of lion numbering up to 40 individuals has made hunting elephant their specialty.,

programme.title: Blue World
programme.sub-title: Queen Anne's Revenge: Blackbeard's Shipwreck, and Night of the Mantas
programme.desc: Blue World joins a team of underwater archaeologists on a project to excavate the remains of Blackbeard the Pirate's ship. Then we travel to Hawaii to locate Manta rays that feed in divers' lights at night.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.sub-title: Invasive Species and the Deepest Dive
programme.desc: Blue World travels from Canada to the Caribbean, looking at invasive species and their effect on the environment. Then we explore 1000 feet below the surface in a special submarine that enables us to study an amazing variety of deep sea animals.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: The Gosa Gang have recently moved to a new home, close to the Gosa Dam where a rival family of meerkats live. In the quest for territorial dominance, a major meerkat standoff resulted in both gangs losing a member of their tribe.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Anchorage is home to an animal renowned as nature's lumberjack and North Americas largest rodent, the beaver. Since humans arrived in Anchorage, many beavers have been forced to live in an urban jungle!

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Anchorage is home to a huge number of porcupines, living in the city's streets, gardens and parks. But life on the streets also takes its toll. Porcupines are the city's number one roadkill.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: There's nothing quite like a destination that knows how to embrace the cold. Samantha loves winter, and she's always looking for places that love it just as much. Join her as she explores the many reasons why Madison, Wisconsin is a Place to Love.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: Welcome to Big Sky, Montana! This is a destination that sees 400 inches of powder on average and is home to nearly 6,000 skiable acres. No matter the season or how low the temperatures drops, there's always something inspiring to find if you're curious enough to look. From embracing the snowy outdoors to enjoying the local businesses of a tight knit community, join Samantha as she explores what makes Big Sky a Place to Love.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy dives into a serious beef bonanza with scratch-made meaty ravioli in Delaware, an elevated spin on the French dip in San Diego and beefed-up Middle-Eastern fare in El Paso, Texas.

programme.title: The Main Event
programme.desc: Join hosts Amon Focus and J. Damany Daniel as they dive into the heart of America's oldest Mardi Gras celebration in Mobile, Alabama.

programme.title: Amplify
programme.desc: Singer/songwriter Summer Dean visits her college stomping grounds and discovers it offers more music history than Buddy Holly. Punk rock drummer Phanie Diaz checks out local art in San Antonio and rapper Lou Charles.

programme.title: Beach Battles
programme.desc: Paddle into Dog Surfing in Pacifica, California, and get picking at the Crab Derby in Crisfield, Maryland.

programme.title: Sorted Food: Game Changers
programme.desc: The guys go head to head to create the best po' boy they can. Who will come out on top?!

programme.title: National Parks Top Ten
programme.desc: Must-see attractions at America's most beautiful locations are highlighted, from a one-kind-of-a-kind hotel outside of Arches National Park to a therapeutic hot springs in Yosemite National Park.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: When you think New York City, you probably envision Manhattan. Yet a lot of the city's heart and soul resides in Brooklyn. As one of the five boroughs in the USA's largest city, Brooklyn is actually quite huge. But don't let the size alarm you—this borough has a low-key, neighborhood vibe that's devoid of the Manhattan hustle. Add in diverse neighborhoods, great food and unexpected businesses, and Brooklyn is a place to love.

programme.title: Diners Drive Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy heads out on a culinary tour of Maui, Hawaii, with his buddy, chef Reno Henriques the tour includes loco moco, kalbi ribs, St. Louis-style ribs, burnt ends and a food truck dishing out the freshest catch.

programme.title: Amplify
programme.desc: Phanie gets a lesson in the bajo sexto, a 12-stringed guitar, while Lou meets the owner of Houston's independent record shop Vinal Edge. Summer tries her hand at graffiti art.

programme.title: Amplify
programme.desc: Summer jams with Nathen Rogers and his band, La Croix Boix. Lou gets a tour of Sugarhill Recording Studio and Phanie's punk band plays alongside the accordion-powered Tex Mex band Piñata Protest.

programme.title: Venturing Out: St. Croix
programme.desc: Adventurer and filmmaker Creighton is joined by co-host and local Olivia who challenges him to step out of his comfort zones in surprising ways.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony accepts the challenge to return to Les Halles for work during his old Tuesday double shift! The episode is a behind-the-curtain look at the working of a restaurant and man who used to cook for a living.

programme.title: United Dates of America
programme.desc: Ruairi, Hardeep, and Luke set out to meet local singles in outdoorsy Denver, Colorado.

programme.title: Sweet Planet
programme.desc: Cakes, maple syrup and taro puree tell a story of inheritance, memory and innovation in different parts of the world. They demonstrate how food can become a symbol of cultural identity and family heritage.,

programme.title: Sweet Planet
programme.desc: The program reveals the unique attraction of sweet food that allows it to transcend geographical boundaries to become a bond shared worldwide, a form of cultural expression, and a means of heritage prevention.,

programme.title: Capturing Winter
programme.desc: Martin and Arthur are two of the world's best FPV drone pilots. Now the duo team up with pro skier and Olympic medalist, Kevin Rolland, for a unique project mount a cinema camera on a racing drone and attempt to film some never-before-seen action.,

programme.title: Capturing Winter
programme.desc: Cinematographer Guido Perrini has created many of the most revered ski and snowboard films. We follow him and multi-talented athlete Géraldine Fasnacht on a snowboarding and base jumping adventure in some of the most stunning peaks in the Swiss Alps.,

programme.title: Capturing Winter
programme.desc: Layla Kerley is a self-taught adventure photographer and one of the few females in her field. Together with Bruno Compagnet, co-founder of freeski brand Blackcrows, they plan to traverse one of the last wildernesses in Europe: the Italian Dolomites.,

programme.title: The Luxury Travel Show
programme.desc: From Michael Angelo's David in Florence to elephant safaris in Sri Lanka, this is an art lovers and outdoorsy adventure.,

programme.title: The Luxury Travel Show

programme.title: The Luxury Travel Show
programme.desc: If you're a budding architect or simply an admirer of beautiful buildings this episode takes in some of best in Europe from London and Barcelona.,

programme.desc: Three artists head to Ibiza to face their street art challenge bringing the local community together through art. But the Mediterranean sun is unforgiving.,

programme.title: Street Art Challenge
programme.desc: Two street artists team up in downtown Hong Kong to hear their street art challenge create awareness for the city's fast growing food waste problem.,

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: SCL Norway is normally all about snow, wind, and cold weather. Our brave athletes are used to compete under conditions few other athletes have competed in, but after COVID delays the competition has been moved from winter to summer bringing in a whole new range of challenges. With an impressive athlete list who will be the winner across 5 cruel events?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Were in sunny Finland for the next stage of a double-bill of SCL action, but this time its a team event. A truly fantastic event with 6000 spectators. Even during COVID times this was exceptional! 8 Strong Teams where fighting for the title over a crazy 9 events.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland, done over 9 cruel events. In this episode the last and final 5 events take place. 8 Strong Teams are fighting for the title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next set of challenges are set in sunny Esposende in Portugal. With stars such as Travis Ortmayer, Kelvin de Ruiter from Holland, and Ervin Toots from Estonia. While Fabio Silva will defend the honour in his own country.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are back in Germany, with the world record breakers. We promise you this is going to be amazing. Do not move from that seat, because we are going to see some records smashed today. Over 6 cruel events, you will see who gets crowned of the King Of The Castle!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: With the next episode of Strongman Champions League Germany. Its the world record breakers, and in the last show we set two new records. Can more be records be broken before the king of the castle is crowned?

programme.desc: A missing colour in a rainbow leads the friends to the Jellygubbins and an unexpected adventure.

programme.title: Tulipop

programme.desc: The Yodies bring ice and snow to Tulipop, and Maddy struggles to ice-skate.

programme.desc: Gloomy's weather spell backfires, causing Tulipop's weather to go wild!

programme.desc: Gloomy's magic makes butterflies enormous, leading to an unexpected ride.

programme.desc: A mermaid's musical practice causes problems, and the friends must help mend a friendship.

programme.desc: The friends must cheer up the Weeping Willow to stop its sad music from affecting everyone.

programme.desc: Grumpkin can't enjoy the sunny day because he turns to stone. Can his friends help?

programme.desc: When the Nordic Lights bring a seed that grows into a magical wishing tree, the friends are excited. They make wishes, with surprising consequences.

programme.desc: Bubble's garden gets flooded by mysterious water sprinkles. The friends investigate and discover Grumpkin the troll, who turned into stone!

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Gloomy and Fred find a rare Muffinpuffin on Tulipop Island and embark on a journey to help it fly. But there's one problem-it looks exactly like a delicious muffin!

programme.desc: On a picnic, Gloomy helps Fred with his yearly bath. But in the process, her cloak disappears! Searching for it, she learns that her bravery and kindness-not the cloak-are what make her special.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Bubble's lettuce garden isn't growing well. Gloomy offers her Grow Better Potion, but the lettuce grows too big-developing a face and demanding constant watering! Now, they must find the antidote!

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: A volcano erupts, covering Gloomy's house in porridge. She moves in with Bubble, but their differing lifestyles cause chaos. Can they find a balance?

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: At the beach, Gloomy and Fred have a falling out but find a mysterious talking conch shell. It relays messages between them-perhaps it will help them mend their friendship!

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred tests out Gloomy's Incredible Shrinking Spray and accidentally makes himself tiny! He has fun at first, but when his friends don't notice him, he must find Gloomy to reverse the spell.

programme.desc: When grim magic contaminates the academy's water supply, the unicorns risk losing their power unless Sophia can save Starglow Lake with an unlikely ally.

programme.desc: Eager to decode the message from the Whispering Willows, Sophia skips party planning to visit the Vision Pool - right after promising Ava she wouldn't.

programme.desc: The Sapphires try everything to get Sophia and Ava to stop fighting, but they've got bigger problems: Two dastardly henchmen are after the grimstone.

programme.title: Unicorn Academy
programme.desc: At Unicorn Academy, regular teen Sophia has a lot to learn about fantastical creatures, but a dark force threatens to return and destroy unicorn magic!

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh? Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Spooky Sensation
programme.desc: The girls decided to spend a weekend at the hotel. It appears to be haunted. Watch the full video to know more about this.

programme.title: Sings of Love
programme.desc: See how Stephanie and Olivia enter the Under the Sea photo competition. Jacob wrote a love song! Olivia and her friends are very excited to hear. Tanya and Stephanie are teamed up in baking class. Watch the video for more fun.

programme.title: Video Wonder
programme.desc: Olivia and Andrea visited science camp with Mrs Stevens. On the other hand, Andrea and Mia decides to return a lost skunk to nature. Andrea was reading intimate postcards between Chef Pierre and Mrs. Stevens.

programme.title: Stiix and Stones
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks – and when they fail to make enough cash, the Ninja decide to steal it – but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but when the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply, the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks. Meanwhile, reluctant to give up being Samurai X, Nya struggles to embrace being a Water Ninja, and Sensei Wu gives her a riddle to figure out. Back at Stiix, when the Ninja fail to make enough cash working the docks, the Ninja decide to steal it... but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. After Moro gets away with the scroll, the Ninja are left dangling, but Ronan saves them at a price – for a piece of their share in the Tea Farm.

programme.title: Girls on Mission
programme.desc: Mia and Stephanie have to use a little horse power at the Sunshine Ranch. Things are getting mixed up on Andrea's first day on the job at Heartlake City Juicebar. Olivia tapes a science show, with a little help from Mia's lemonade stand - and special effects! Andrea relaxes at the beach while Emma is hard at work at her lifeguard tower. Stephanie has to face her fears when the class gets an 'Animal Kingdom & 'school assignment.'Emma and Stephanie accidentally rent a scary movie and suddenly there are beasts everywhere...

programme.title: The Hands Of Time
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time. But the arrival of the first Time Blade – a weapon with the power to speed up time – sends the Ninja to the Monastery just in time to rescue their master from certain doom.

programme.title: The Hatching
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated. But with Wu out of action and suffering from the effects of the Time Punch, the Ninja discover a new enemy in their midst: The Vermillion Warriors. And the Ninjas have no idea who controls them...

programme.title: A Time Of Traitors
programme.desc: Kai's investigation of a Vermillion Warrior Helmet leads him to discover that Krux is alive and well in Ninjago, living under an assumed identity. Meanwhile, as the Vermillion Warriors go on a kidnapping spree, Lloyd struggles with his role as master-in-training and Nya does her best to reboot Zane, who was knocked off line in his first battle with the Vermillion.

programme.title: The Mask Of Deception
programme.desc: When an unknown criminal syndicate threatens the Royal Family, the Ninja are called back into action and must protect the royal princess and a fabled artifact that may hold supernatural powers. The ninja find themselves scattered to the four corners of the kingdom. Cole and Jay are searching in vain for some sign of Master Wu. Nya fights injustice in the north, while Kai and Zane attempt to fend off an angry lava beast in the west. This leaves Lloyd alone in Ninjago City. He rushes to the scene of a heist at Borg Tower and finds himself up against a team of highly trained operatives led by the mysterious masked MISTER-E. Lloyd fails to prevent the heist and an ancient artifact, the MASK OF DECEPTION, is stolen. Lloyd apprehends one of the criminals but the others escape. Dismayed by his failure, Lloyd calls the ninjas back to Ninjago. The friends are reunited and hope for a little rest and relaxation. These hopes are dashed with the arrival MASTER HUTCHINS, a servant of the Royal Family of Ninjago, who has been sent by the EMPEROR to request their help. A new criminal gang, SONS OF GARMADON (SOG), is attempting to acquire three ancient masks called the ONI MASKS, which are rumored to possess supernatural powers.

programme.title: The Gray Knight
programme.desc: Using his Stone to Life magic the Cloud of Monstrox turns Clay into a living, fighting, breathing stone fighting knight. But will Clay use his forces to fight for good or for evil? Does he have a choice? The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro are able to unlock the forbidden Power Shocking Scare and unleash an attack on the village of Bravington. Knights in their new vehicles rush to the rescue and are able to defeat him with a new Combo Power. In the heat of the battle, the Cloud of Monstrox sees the stone statue of Clay and zaps him to life! Clay is now turned, and is fighting against his friends. It is impossible for them to defeat him without destroying him for good. The Cloud urges Clay on. He attacks the Fortrex in order to get to Merlok. Robin in his Black Knight Mech is trying to stop him, but to no avail. Merlok 2.0 is left undefended. At the very last moment Merlok 2.0 unleashes a blasting spell that sends Clay far far away.

programme.title: The Good, The Bad And The Tightwad
programme.desc: Clay wakes up in the poor town of Nothing Hill which literally have nothing. Will Clay remember who he is and what he is fighting for. His friends try to help him, but Jorah Tightwad and his Bots get in the way. Clay as the Gray Knight wakes up far away in a place called Nothing Hill. A poor town where they literally have nothing. They harvest dust. Jorah Tightwad though has found that there is gold underneath the town. He convinces the confused Clay to help him put pressure on the poor townsfolk to give up their lots. This is an easy job for the strong Gray Knight. The NEXO KNIGHTS finally track him down and tries to convince him about who he is. But to the Gray Knight they are still his enemies, and a giant battle ensues in order to subdue the Gray Knight. At last, only Macy is left. When she begins to recite the Knights Code, some words and their meaning are able to get through the stone hard shell of the Gray Knight and the Evil that clouded him seems to disappear. Together they are able to return the ownership of the town to the villagers.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: Chased Dreamers
programme.desc: To craft their own hourglasses and become official Dream Chasers for the Night Bureau, Mateo and his friends must defeat the Dream Forge guardian.

programme.title: The Dream Forge
programme.desc: As time runs out to face the Dream Forge and become official Dream Chasers, Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit.

programme.title: Legendary Places, Ninjago's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle and also Kai enters Zane's mind and suggests the Ninja take a break from puzzle-solving to figure out which villain is trying to hack their friend.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Now that Megatron's body is rebuilt, he leads the Decepticons in his search for the AllSpark.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and his band of Autobots are taken off the job.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus teams up with Sentinel Prime in order to defeat the Headmaster.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Unaware of the Decepticon activity, the Elite Guard take Optimus Prime and the Autobots back to Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: With Starscream's help, the Autobots infiltrate the Decepticon moon base.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Alexis tracks a minicon in the vicinity of Mars.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Starscream trusts Thrust and returns to the moon base.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Ratchet finds himself in a series of predicaments as he resumes his experiments on Synthetic Energon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The fate of Earth hangs in the balance as the Autobots and Decepticons march toward their last stand.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Transformers Prime deepens the epic mythology of both the AUTOBOTS and DECEPTICONS.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots investigate the return of the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Octane and Trypticon conspire to help the greedy King Fakaddi.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: Forever is a Long Time Coming
programme.desc: The Quintessons embark on a time-traveling mission to change their history.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Wheelie and Daniel risk capture by the Decepticons to give their friend Ultra Magnus a birthday party.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Grimlock and Daniel are accidentally transported into a dimension of wizards and warriors.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Bookworm Smurf: Brainy Smurf is aghast. Sassette cannot read, and thus might be forever prevented from learning the pearls of wisdom collected in his book "Brainy Smurf's quotations"! He tries teaching her how to read. What she can read almost from the start is a formula to make all the books disappear! All the books in the world, including Gargamel's spells and Homnibus' books of remedies!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Three Smurfketeers: In another Smurf theatrical super-production based – very loosely – on Alexandre Dumas' characters, a masterpiece of the stage is created, with a few lines from Romeo and Juliet thrown in.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurfs' Christmas: The Smurfs come to the rescue of two children and their grandfather when a mysterious stranger appears and causes their sleigh to crash. Knocking on Gargamel's door for help puts them and the Smurfs in danger…

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Clockwork Smurf: Handy has built a very complex Smurf machine that does everything. It proves dangerous when it nearly destroys the village, but comes in useful when, with the help of the other Smurfs, it saves the young prince Gerard's kingdom from the queen aunt Imperia's dastardly intentions.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Fountain Of Smurf: The Smurfs discover a fountain of youth that is guarded by a wicked troll, who steals Papa Smurf's magic book. They convince Gargamel to help them and the greedy villain runs to get the water, but manages to fall in with the troll. As the two chase each other all over the countryside, the Smurfs are able to retrieve Papa Smurf's book.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Littlest Giant: Simon is lost in the forest and in search of his parents. Simon is the son of a couple of giants. The Smurfs try to bring him home, but then Gargamel interrupts the party.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Once In A Blue Moon: Once in a blue moon, as the legend goes, a baby Smurf is delivered to the Smurfs and everyone in the village becomes attached to the new arrival. But a mistake has been made and the stork returns to take the baby back. Grouchy and Smurfette have become so attached to the baby that the baby is returned.

programme.title: Gargamel's Mis-Fortune
programme.desc: Gargamel, the evil but incompetent wizard, tries to trick Esmeralda, the gypsy, into giving him a formula to catch the Smurfs. Of course the gypsy proves to be much smarter than Gargamel, and the Smurfs even more so.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Tick Tock Smurfs: The village of the Smurfs used to live without a clock. But now suddenly time becomes a precious commodity and Brainy Smurf designs a schedule to take advantage of the new Village clock... Can the Smurfs survive the attacks of time?

programme.title: Hefty And The Wheelsmurfer
programme.desc: Hefty Smurf learns what is to be handicapped when he breaks his leg. Handy Smurf creates the wheelsmurfer for him, a contraption that will give Hefty some mobility. But suddenly the evil wizard Gargamel appears on the scene.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfette's Golden Tresses: Hogatha, the repulsive witch, captures the Smurfette. She wants to steal from the little blue beauty her golden hair. Can the Smurfs save their little female companion before it is too late? Can Hogatha grow hair like Smurfette's?

programme.title: Monster Smurfs
programme.desc: This is spook-a-Smurf eve, and all the Smurfs get ready for the fancy dress party… But Brainy Smurf gets hold of Papa Smurf's Book of Magic, and all the Smurfs are changed into hideous but funny creatures. Yet danger lurks...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurf The Other Cheek: Hefty Smurf meets an old Trolless in the forest, and the old crone begs him to relieve her of a red spot on her nose by... giving her a good kick here and now! Hefty half-heartedly obliges... And the result is a big surprise for him!

programme.title: The Trojan Smurf
programme.desc: Gargamel, the evil wizard, has devised a new plan to capture the Smurfs: he builds a giant statue in the shape of Papa Smurf. Thus, he hopes, the Smurfs are going to drag the statue into their Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Patchwork Bear: There isn't a River Smurf anymore: someone has frozen it near its source. The Smurfs go to the Emerald Empress' country to see what the trouble is, and they meet the Patchwork Bear as well as the Iron Pyrites...

programme.title: Smurfette's Sweet Tooth
programme.desc: Once a year, Greedy Smurf makes a special batch of Smurfberry candy. Every Smurf receives a whole year's provision of the smurfiest candy in the whole world. But can a Smurf keep his provision for a whole year? Can the Smurfette?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Breakfast At Greedy's: This time, Gargamel feels sure of himself. Well, almost. He is going to try and finally catch the little Smurfs! Greedy Smurf's lighter-than-air pancakes are almost responsible for the Smurfs floating into Gargamel's grasp...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Petrified Smurfs: Brainy Smurf's done it again. This time, in front of Papa Smurf, too. He has recited a spell that changes everything to stone. Everything including himself and all the Smurfs and the Village, and the forest around for miles... Fortunately, Peewit appears....

programme.title: The Bignose Dilemma
programme.desc: Vanity dislikes having the same blue nose as any other Smurf. What he needs is something special... Bignose, Bigmouth's fiancée, also wants to change her nose. And so, by the way, does Gargamel. Some nose exchanging takes place...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfily Ever After: The boy from the wood and Laconia, the deaf-mute elf, ask Papa Smurf to celebrate their wedding. The Smurfs are getting the party ready, following the advice of the Smurfette, when Gargamel comes to put a spoke in their wheel.

programme.title: The Rabbids are doing something stupid.
programme.desc: A Rabbid walks down the street when he steps on some chewing gum.

programme.title: Rabbids robbery.
programme.desc: The Rabbids follow a burglary.

programme.title: The Rabbids are making a mess!
programme.desc: After discovering the joys of tennis, the Rabbids move the game onto an airport runway.

programme.title: Rabbids VS Technology.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get locked inside a supermarket for the night.

programme.title: Smile, Rabbids!
programme.desc: When a family tries to take a nice picture at a wedding ceremony, the Rabbids ruin everything.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: On a school trip, Dennis finds out that he is descentant to a warrior tribe. He also discovers that Montanna Smith (a famous Indiana Jones-esque explorer and one of Walter's personal heroes) is actually a thief who's trying to steal the treasure of Dennis' ancestor. Will he be stopped before he gets his hands on the treasure? Followed by Dog Tired.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After watching a film about an alien invasion, Dennis, Curly and Pie Face decide to make their own film. However, Walter stumbles across them filming, and he only sees the action, not the camera. Filming what he sees on his mobile phone, he runs to tell the whole of Beanotown about the alien invasion. As panic spreads, Dennis and his friends discover the chaos and decide to keep filming in order to help make the best of their own alien film. Meanwhile, Sergeant Slipper investigates the alien landing that Walter has seen, and discovers the truth—that the spaceship is a playhouse with glow sticks in it. Followed by 'Castle in the Air'

programme.desc: Sonic conquers Robotnik's latest evil - a vehicle designated to locate and destroy living tissue matter - during a solo mission to the Badlands. Upon Sonic's return, the Freedom Fighters honor him with a victory party.

programme.desc: When Robotnik launches a spy-orb that will uncover the Freedom Fighter's Knothole location, Sonic and Robot launch themselves up to the orbiting spy-sphere aboard a home-made rocket powered by Robotnik's discarded booster engine.

programme.desc: A small bird wants to befriend Mr. Bean, but its squawking sound annoys Mrs. Wicket.

programme.title: The Lift
programme.desc: Mr. Bean goes on a lift to the top floor of a toy shop, but Teddy gets stuck in the doors and jams the lift.

programme.desc: It is a nice sunny day and Mr. Bean and Mrs. Wicket are relaxing in the garden.

programme.title: Bean Hypnotised

programme.title: Car Wash

programme.title: Where Did You Get That Cat?

programme.title: Valuable Lessons
programme.desc: Two burglars hatch up an evil plan in which one of them disguises himself as a gentleman.

programme.title: Halloween
programme.desc: On Halloween night, Mr. Bean prepares to give the children some tricks and treats they won't forget.

programme.title: Bean Painting
programme.desc: Mr. Bean paints a picture of Teddy, but accidentally splashes some green paint on the wall.

programme.title: Wrestle Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is trying to read a book but he is disturbed by the noise of Mrs. Wicket and her friend.

programme.title: Rare Bird
programme.desc: Mr. Bean loves bird spotting and is desperate to tick off the last elusive bird in his book.

programme.title: Barbie: Dreamtopia
programme.desc: Barbie's youngest sister Chelsea is entered into a local bike race by her friend, she is embarrassed about not being able to ride without training wheels. Inspired by Barbie's stories, Chelsea finds herself transported to the magical world of Dreamtopia, where her imagination runs wild.

programme.title: Air Bud: Seventh Inning Fetch
programme.desc: With Josh off to college, Buddy joins the local baseball squad with his little sister Andrea. Once again, Buddy is a natural at anything with a ball! He is having a great season when suddenly, his puppies start to disappear from their homes!

programme.title: Postman Pat: The Movie
programme.desc: Postman Pat, a mail carrier, lives an idyllic life in the quaint British town of Greendale. When a national talent TV show comes to town, Pat enters. But when he comes face-to-face with the temptations of money – can he resist?

programme.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks: The Squeakquel
programme.desc: The world famous singing pre-teen chipmunk trio return to contend with the pressures of school, celebrity, and a rival female music group known as The Chipettes.

programme.title: Mosley
programme.desc: To save his family, Mosley, must embark on an epic journey to find the legendary Uprights... but what he unexpectedly finds will unlock a secret revealing his true nature. With large and layered themes, Mosley tells a timeless adventurous tale of family, love and hope!

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: Between us
programme.desc: Henry and Dianne fear that settling down means giving up on their dreams. It will take the universe conspiring to keep them apart for them to realize just how much they need each other.

programme.title: My Super Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: A man who dumps his long-time girlfriend discovers his ex is a superhero, and she's out for revenge.

programme.title: Home Sweet Hell
programme.desc: Don Champage is a successful businessman who seems to have it all--including an obsessive wife who relentlessly controls everything in his life

programme.title: Disaster Zone: Volcano in New York
programme.desc: The manager of a construction crew has to save New York when experimental technology causes a volcano to erupt under the city. Starring Michael Ironside and Costas Mandylor (2006).

programme.title: Meteor Storm
programme.desc: San Francisco is a target for waves of destructive meteors after a rogue comet breaks from its orbit. Starring Micheal Trucco and Kari Matchett (2010)

programme.title: Stonados
programme.desc: When a sinister weather system develops and starts to throw off exploding bowling - ball sized stones, a former storm chaser decides to take drastic action. Stars Paul Johansson (2013).

programme.title: The Love Punch
programme.desc: THE LOVE PUNCH brings together Pierce Brosnan and Emma Thompson for the first time, as ex-husband and wife Richard and Kate whose biting banter suggests that the flames of their former relationship have not been fully extinguished…

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: I Feel Pretty
programme.desc: A woman struggling with insecurity wakes from a fall believing she is the most beautiful woman on the planet. Her new confidence empowers her to live fearlessly, but what happens when she realizes her appearance never changed?

programme.title: Stuck in Love
programme.desc: Three years after his divorce, acclaimed novelist Bill Borgens (Academy Award® nominee Greg Kinnear) is still obsessed with his ex-wife Erica (Academy Award® winner Jennifer Connelly), who left him for another man.

programme.title: Away from Her
programme.desc: A double-Oscar-nominated, beautifully subtle exploration of a devastating disease Julie Christie turns in a Golden Globe winning performance in this honest, life-affirming story of relationships, love and devotion.

programme.title: Dead Man Running
programme.desc: Nick's borrowed money from a loan shark. He's 4 weeks behind. He gets 24 hours to come up with GBP100,000. His mom's a hostage.

programme.title: Big Mommas House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: Prince Valiant
programme.desc: In a time now lost in the mists of memory, the great King Arthur rules in the legendary citadel that is Camelot. Starring: Stephen Moyer, Katherine Heigl, Thomas Kretschmann

programme.title: Out of the Furnace
programme.desc: When Rodney Baze mysteriously disappears and law enforcement doesn't follow through fast enough, his older brother Russell takes matters into his own hands to find justice.

programme.title: A Haunted House
programme.desc: When Malcolm's (Marlon Wayans) girlfriend moves into his house, he soon discovers the love of his life is possessed by an evil spirit. Malcolm enlists the help of Father Williams (Cedric the Entertainer) to exorcise the demon from his girlfriend.

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: When Bella Swan moves to a small town, she falls in love with Edward Cullen, a 108-year-old vampire.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga
programme.desc: Edward leaves Bella, and she falls into another difficult relationship - this time with Jacob Black.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga
programme.desc: Bella is forced to choose between her love for vampire Edward and her friendship with werewolf Jacob.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga
programme.desc: The Quileutes close in on Edward and Bella, whose unborn child poses a threat to the Wolf Pack and Forks.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Riveting Sci-Fi action-thriller Push is set in a deadly world of psychic espionage where the ability to move objects using only the mind, see the future, create new realities and kill without ever touching the victim can turn a person into a lethal weapon - or a target. A young man (Chris Evans - Sunshine, Fantastic Four ) and a teenage girl with extraordinary gifts (Dakota Fanning - War of the Worlds) take on a clandestine agency in a battle they can win only if they change the future.

programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveler, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attach for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: Mercenaries
programme.desc: Andy Marlow is an S.A.S serviceman turned mercenary working covertly in the Balkans. During political unrest, Olodan Cracovic, the ex-commander of the Croat Army and wanted war criminal, and his army raid the U.S. Embassy, taking the U.S Ambassador captive. The decision is taken to send in mercenaries to carry out the rescue. Sent under the cover of darkness, the Mercenaries infiltrate Olodan\s headquarters, taking him captive and freeing the Ambassador. However, the rescue is far from over. Faced with transporting them to a safe area and with Olodan\s right hand man in pursuit, the team find themselves outnumbered, outgunned and fighting what could easily be a losing battle.

programme.title: Pandorum
programme.desc: Two astronauts (Dennis Quaid, Vantage Point and Ben Foster, 30 Days of Night) awaken in a hyper-sleep chamber aboard a seemingly abandoned spacecraft. It's pitch black, they are disoriented, and the only sound is a low rumble and creak from the belly of the ship. They can't remember anything like who they are and what their mission is, but one thing they do realise very quickly is that they are not alone. Slowly the spacecraft's shocking, deadly secrets are revealed and the astronauts find that they must fight to stay alive and that their survival is more important than they could ever have imagined. Directed by Christian Alvart and also starring Cam Gigandet (Twilight), Cung Le (Tekken) and newcomer Antje Traue.

programme.title: The God Committee
programme.desc: Who lives, who dies? They decide. Three patients wait to see if they will live or die as a hospital committee decides to grant a life saving heart transplant to one of them. Years later the committee face the consequences of their decision. Starring Emmy Award winner Kelsey Grammer (Frasier) and Julia Stiles (Riviera), Janeane Garofalo (The Truth about Cats & Dogs) and Colman Domingo (Selma).

programme.title: Pirates of Somalia
programme.desc: Based on a shocking true story and starring Evan Peters (Xmen franchise), Barkhad Abdi (Captain Philips) and Al Pacino (The Godfather). In search of a unique and worthy story, an aspiring journalist travels to Somalia to write about the life of the Pirates. But he soon becomes embroiled in a dark and dangerous fight which will risk everything, including his life.

programme.title: I Still See You
programme.desc: Bella Thorne stars in this enthralling and tense supernatural thriller. Ten years after an apocalyptic event left the world haunted by ghosts, Roni (Thorne: Midnight Sun) receives a threatening message from beyond the grave. Joining forces with a mysterious classmate Kirk (Richard Harmon: The 100), Roni descends into a shadow world and begins a desperate race against time to stop a cunning killer.

programme.title: Blood and Money
programme.desc: Combining edge-of-your-seat thrills, suspense and breath-taking cinematography, acting legend and Academy Award nominee Tom Berenger (Inception) stars as a retired veteran who, whilst hunting in the snowy outback of Northern Maine, discovers a dead body and a bag full of cash. Violence quickly escalates when a group of criminals in search of the loot turn the hunter in to the hunted.

programme.title: Just The Way You Are
programme.desc: Married couple Jennie and Ian try to bring back the spark in their relationship.

programme.title: Sunrise in Heaven [aka Forever Love]
programme.desc: A true story that spans over four decades between Jan and young G.I Steve, navigating family, faith, and love. You will be in for a roller-coaster of emotions. (2019)

programme.title: When Love Came to Town
programme.desc: Abby is a famous author whose latest stop on her book tour takes her to the town of Bliss. But little does she know that the locals are keen to play matchmaker for her. Lauren Holly stars. (2014)

programme.title: Meet Me in New York
programme.desc: Kelly is an ambitious events planner who has an awkward first encounter with her new client Joe. But will their feelings towards each other change when they start to work closer together? (2021)

programme.title: Love in Full Swing
programme.desc: Becks goes back home to help her friend, Casey, confess his love for his high school sweetheart. But will Becks be honest with her own heart? (2020)

programme.title: Departures
programme.desc: Skye (Maisie Williams), an impulsive teenager with a terminal illness, befriends Calvin (Asa Butterfield), a 19-year-old hypochondriac who is afraid of his own shadow.

programme.title: To The Wonder
programme.desc: After falling in love in Paris, Marina and Neil come to Oklahoma, where problems arise. Their church's Spanish-born pastor struggles with his faith, while Neil encounters a woman from his childhood.

programme.title: Listen Out for Love
programme.desc: Peyton Pepper, a goal-driven podcast producer, is forced to mold Alex McKinney, a brash loose cannon, into her next star and create the perfect show to save both of their careers. That show comes in the form of finding Peyton's iconic idol, true love.

programme.title: Tennessee Williams' The Roman Spring of Mrs. Stone
programme.desc: After moving to Rome, a lonely widow finds herself consumed by a destructive love for a young Italian man in this adaptation of Tennessee Williams' haunting novella.

programme.title: Christmas à la Carte
programme.desc: When food correspondent, CARLY, gets a shot at her own show nothing goes as planned. She's sent to Angel Heights to help GRANT, a chef, reopen her family's beloved diner and film it for her television show.

programme.title: Under the Greenwood Tree
programme.desc: A love story grows between local boy Dick Dewey and beautiful schoolteacher Fancy Day. But in seeking her hand in marriage penniless Dick finds himself in competition with other more likely suitors.

programme.title: The Flight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Starring Mayim Bialik and Ryan McPartlin. Two strangers offer to share the last remaining room at a bed-and-breakfast when a snowstorm strands their flight in Montana on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Falling in Love at Christmas
programme.desc: Miranda and Paul, two rivals, meet on a costumed Santa crawl and spend a romantic evening together without learning each other's identities. As their anonymous romance continues online, their businesses merge, forcing them into an unwanted partnership.

programme.title: A Candlelit Christmas
programme.desc: Ellie, a perfume maker, travels back home for Christmas and help her dad with the business. Little does she know, that Logan is staying with him. As Ellie's attempts to learn about her family, Logan helps her realize that fairy tales do indeed exist!

programme.title: Plus One at an Amish Wedding
programme.desc: April Monroe is a superstar doctor at a big New York hospital, who has fallen head-over-heels for charming veterinarian Jesse, and their relationship seems to be heading in the right direction except for one thing: Jesse is completely tight-lipped about his Amish family.

programme.title: Calling For Love
programme.desc: Podcaster Sam Sanders is assigned to host a show that reunites lost loves. Even though Love is the last thing on her mind, Samantha falls for charming Jake who calls in with a problem. Will Samantha follow her heart this time?

programme.title: Lights, Camera, Romance
programme.desc: Actress Emma Hutton is determined to help find her friend Hope a perfect match but in doing so, she accidentally tramples on several hearts. When Emma realizes she herself has always loved her good friend Gray, Emma learns love works best when she doesn't meddle with it. A charming romance inspired by Jane Austen's "Emma."

programme.title: Love, Lost & Found
programme.desc: Claire gets a surprise proposal on a mountain hike with her boyfriend Joey but when they get separated, a rancher turns Claire's head and a park ranger makes Joey see they're made for each other.

programme.title: Midway to Love
programme.desc: When the network announces that her television therapy show is changing to a tabloid shock-fest, a straight laced and caring psychologist returns to her hometown and reunites with her high school sweetheart while finally realizing that having someone to share a life with is more important than fame and the excitement of the city.

programme.title: Psycho BFF
programme.desc: Renee forbids her daughter's relationship with a friend from continuing.

programme.title: Pretty Little Addict
programme.desc: Jennifer Phillips starts drinking after her father's death and injures Colin.

programme.title: Psycho-In-Law
programme.desc: It's been two years since Tina's husband-to-be, Brock, lost his first wife.

programme.title: Michelle/Troy and Josh
programme.desc: Three masked gunmen burst into Michelle's home.

programme.title: Psycho BFF
programme.desc: Renee forbids her daughter's relationship with a friend from continuing.

programme.title: Another Man's Wife
programme.desc: After a tragic car accident, a family gets away to a remote mountain cabin to recover and rebuild their lives. During their vacation, a handsome man befriends them only to get revenge and destroy what is left of their fragile lives.

programme.title: Meet Me in New York
programme.desc: Events planner Kelly meets her match in web editor Joe when planning his niece's birthday party.

programme.title: You Can't Fight Christmas
programme.desc: When the Christmas-loving designer Leslie meets handsome scroogey Edmund, she's determined to change his mind.

programme.title: Miss Me This Christmas
programme.desc: Regina falls for a billionaire while waiting for her divorce settlement, but her ex isn't ready to let go.

programme.title: A Gift for Christmas
programme.desc: A handsome stranger develops amnesia after a hopeless romantic crashes into him on her bicycle.

programme.title: Are We Done Yet?
programme.desc: Now married to Suzanne, Nick Persons has bought a quiet suburban house to escape the rat race of the big city and to provide more space for his new wife and kids Lindsey and Kevin. But when his new home quickly becomes a costly "fixer upper" and he finds himself at the mercy of an eccentric contractor, Nick's suburban dream becomes a riotous nightmare.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: A father finds himself unemployed and decides to turn his home into a day care.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians puts together a purposely horrible team so they'll lose and she can move the team. But when the plot is uncovered, they start winning just to spite her.

programme.title: The Interview
programme.desc: Story revolves around a handsome talk show host and his producer who find themselves in way over their heads when they get involved in a plot to assassinate the prime minister of North Korea.

programme.title: Django the Bastard
programme.desc: A ghostlike stranger arrives to avenge a Civil War betrayal. Former Confederate officers who caused the massacre of their own unit begin to die one by one, as Django delivers chilling justice from beyond the grave.

programme.title: Gunfighters Die Harder
programme.desc: Crooked bankers plan an insurance swindle and hire a Mexican gang to steal the bank's gold but they also pay Lasky's gang to kill the Mexicans.

programme.title: California
programme.desc: After the Civil War, Michael "California" Random, is released from prison and goes to Missouri with his partner William.

programme.title: A Lust to Kill
programme.desc: A cowboy escapes from jail with the help of his girlfriend, and goes after the men he believes are responsible for his brother being shot down by lawmen.

programme.title: Hell's Outpost
programme.desc: A Korean war veteran attempts to help a small town mine owner develop his tungsten mine in spite of efforts by the town boss to stop him.

programme.title: The Ghost Train (1941)
programme.desc: When the ghost train appears, passengers are drawn into a mysterious web of crime.

programme.title: Doctor in the House
programme.desc: Comedy. Medical student Simon Sparrow deals with the issues of working in a hospital.

programme.title: Doctor at Sea
programme.desc: Simon sets off for the sea aboard a steamship where he encounters eccentric characters.

programme.title: Doctor in Love
programme.desc: Sir Lancelot Spratt gives his medical students a slating to remember over a patient. The patient is Dr Richard Hare, a student who has fallen ill with jaundice and, in love with the enticing Night Nurse!

programme.title: Raising the Wind
programme.desc: A riotous comedy about a group of music students who live in fear of conductor Sir Benjamin Boyd, a tyrant of a master who attempts to prevent the lads from indulging in any 'extra-curricular' activity. When part of the scholarship is to conduct a full orchestra, all imaginable hell is let loose!

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: Seeking a way to save their doomed world, a crew of tiny, human-looking aliens arrives on Earth in the perfect disguise--a spaceship shaped like an ordinary man.

programme.title: Aliens in the Attic
programme.desc: An adventure/comedy about kids on a family vacation who must fight off an attack by knee-high alien invaders with world-destroying ambitions. At the same time the youngsters try to keep their parents in the dark about the battle upstairs.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: Sharknado
programme.desc: When a freak tornado swamps Los Angeles, thousands of man-eating sharks are sucked into the swirling vortex, terrorizing the waterlogged populace and flooding the city with shark-infested seawater.

programme.title: Sharknado 2: The Second One
programme.desc: Fin Shepard and his ex-wife April are flying to New York City when their plane enters the most unnatural of storms and is battered by airborne sharks.

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Deadly Deed
programme.desc: When a banker is found dead in a Victorian mansion, Shannon Hughes finds herself within another murder case. Starring Jewel (2018)

programme.title: Murder 101: Locked Room Mystery
programme.desc: A criminology professor and a private eye investigate a murder at a new age retreat

programme.title: Martha's Vineyard: Riddled With Deceit
programme.desc: (2020) Thriller with Jesse Metcalfe. A missing family heirloom is the key to finding the truth as former detective Jeff Jackson teams up with Dr Zee Madieras to track down a murderer.

programme.title: The Trust
programme.desc: Nic Cage and Elijah Wood star as two crooked cops who discover a hidden safe, the contents of which will lead them down a deadly road of corruption.

programme.title: Extraction
programme.desc: When a former CIA agent is captured by Russian drug dealers and left for dead, it's up to his son to try and rescue him. Starring Bruce Willis, Kellan Lutz and Gina Carano (2015).

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Armored
programme.desc: A young armored car guard is persuaded by his veteran cohorts to empty the truck of its $10 Million.

programme.title: Accident Man
programme.desc: Mike Fallon, the Accident Man, is a stone cold killer, he is the best at what he does. But when a loved one is dragged into the London underworld and murdered by his own crew, Fallon is forced to rip apart the life he knew in order to avenge the one person who actually meant something to him.

Academy Award Winner Kevin Spacey (The Usual Suspects) and young Hollywood super star Kate Boswoth (Superman Returns) star in this clever & adreniline filled heist film. An MIT math whiz is recruited by a teacher to join a specialized team of card counters. They break away from their mentor before casino security finally catches up with them. Based on book "Bringing Down the House." It co-stars Lawrence Fishburne (Matrix Trilogy).

programme.title: 3000 Miles To Graceland
programme.desc: Posing as Elvis impersonators, ex-convicts rob a Las Vegas casino during an Elvis Presley fan convention, but greed and dissention among them ultimately lead to betrayal and chaos.

programme.title: Skin
programme.desc: A black child born to white parents is cast out of white society in 1950s South Africa. The film follows her thirty-year journey to acceptance.

programme.title: The Good Lie
programme.desc: Orphaned during the Sudanese Civil War, a group of young refugees are given the opportunity to leave their camp and resettle in America.

programme.title: Professor Marston & The Wonder Women
programme.desc: PROFESSOR MARSTON & THE WONDER WOMEN is based on the extraordinary true story of the creator of one of the most iconic super heroes ever conceived, and the seductive secret life he kept from his fans.

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: From the pages of Marvel Comics — creators of X-Men and Spider-Man — comes ELEKTRA, the first action-event movie of the year. In the ultimate battle between good and evil stands a warrior who makes the choice that tips the balance.

programme.title: The Fountain
programme.desc: Two immortally linked souls transcend the boundaries of time and space, one desperately searching for the answers that will save the other, and deliver the promise of eternal life.

programme.title: Deadly Inferno
programme.desc: During some extensive renovations on an eight-storey office building, a major gas leak leads to a terrible explosion, trapping the injured staff in a fiery maze. Can the brave firefighters provide a safe exit from this deadly inferno?

programme.title: Last Looks
programme.desc: Last Looks is a pacy and star-studded homicide mystery set in the heart of Hollywood. Alistair Pinch (Mel Gibson), is an eccentric but successful actor who spends his days drunk living the high-life in Hollywood. When his wife is found dead he becomes the prime suspect in her murder.

programme.title: Eliminators
programme.desc: Martin Parker (Scott Adkins), a highly trained former DEA agent, is hiding in the witness protection program in London with his young daughter, Carly. His world is turned upside down when a group of thugs break into his home looking for hidden contraband.
